title: RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Concentration Risk Management) – Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI amended concentration risk rules to cap unsecured loans at 20% of total advances. The move aims to reduce systemic risk and strengthen financial stability of urban co-operative banks.
The post RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Concentration Risk Management) – Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
